items.content_html: A plugin that adds Vim-like modal editing and keybindings to Textual, enabling efficient text navigation and manipulation. It integrates seamlessly with Textual, bringing Vim’s Normal, Insert, and Visual modes for enhanced productivity and a familiar workflow.
items.title: Vedant-Asati03/textual-vim-extended: A plugin that adds Vim-like modal editing and keybindings to Textual, enabling efficient text navigation and manipulation. It integrates seamlessly with Textual, bringing Vim’s Normal, Insert, and Visual modes for enhanced productivity and a familiar workflow.
